name: Calico Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can Red kidney beans, drained and rinsed
1 can Yellow wax beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and drain the kidney, green, and wax beans.
2. Add the chopped onion and onions rings to the beans.
3. In a bowl, mix the sugar, salad oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper until well combined.
4. Pour the dressing over the salad and chill.
